name: enzo
description: Choose minds, workrooms, and styles to turn founder evidence into decisions and shipped work.

interface.longDescription: Choose a business workroom, assemble reviewed methodological minds, keep their first analyses independent, preserve disagreement, and turn the founder's final choice into artifacts or approval-gated engineering work.
defaultPrompt: Compose a product workroom and recommend the smallest reviewed council.
Choose a design style and turn this founder decision into a build-ready direction.
Use Forward Deployed Engineering to scope, verify, and deploy this change safely.
